category_title: Relationship-dependent students sensitive to teacher attitude
scenario_title: Drawing a face in art class
minimal_context: The student is drawing someone's face in art class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Today we are drawing someone's face. Here is the exact structure you must follow, and we need to get this done quickly.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't just start tinkering around with the middle, like the eyes and the nose and the mouth, when there's so much pressure to do it quickly.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just look at the instructions and keep working.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: But you didn't show me the basic shape first or let me practice filling it in.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Do your best to get it done.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I feel too much pressure. If you structure it like this, I need to have someone hold my hand throughout the entire thing. I need everyone's help!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Today we are drawing someone's face. Here is the exact structure you must follow, and we need to get this done quickly.

STUDENT: I can't just start tinkering around with the middle, like the eyes and the nose and the mouth, when there's so much pressure to do it quickly.

TUTOR: Just look at the instructions and keep working.

STUDENT: But you didn't show me the basic shape first or let me practice filling it in.

TUTOR: Do your best to get it done.

STUDENT: I feel too much pressure. If you structure it like this, I need to have someone hold my hand throughout the entire thing. I need everyone's help!
